recipe.title: Dump & Bake Spicy Ramen Soup
steps: Place coconut milk, chicken stock, curry paste, peanut butter, soy sauce, sesame oil, and ginger into a large baking dish. Whisk until combined.
Add ramen noodles and press to submerge. Scatter chicken around the noodles, then top with chopped bok choy.
Cover tightly with foil and bake 15 minutes.
Remove from oven and loosen noodles with chopsticks. Crack eggs over the top and return to oven, uncovered, 8 to 10 minutes until chicken is cooked through and eggs are set to your liking.
Drizzle with chilli oil and scatter fresh coriander over the top. Serve directly from the dish.
